title: Vacancy for Teacher at IIT Delhi

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Teacher at IIT Delhi
jsonLd.description:
IIT Delhi, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Teacher for our Nashik operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIT Delhi:
IIT Delhi is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Mentoring

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIT Delhi!
